public static T GetDataEncoded<T>(
	this IClientData data,
	string key
)

Type: T

Usage Note

In Visual Basic and C#, you can call this method as an instance method on any object of type IClientData. When you use instance method syntax to call this method, omit the first parameter. For more information, see Extension Methods (Visual Basic) or Extension Methods (C# Programming Guide).
